---
title: "taliesin_forge.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\sentinel\taliesin_forge.py"
loc: 76
complexity: 9
logic_score: 6.72
style_score: 3.81
intel_score: 5.61
overall_score: 3.42
---

## Intent
The `taliesin_forge.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on extract_json, TaliesinForge, __init__, weave_code_from_lore. It forms a node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via extract_json, TaliesinForge, __init__, weave_code_from_lore. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 6.7/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 5.6/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 14 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [asyncio](file://asyncio)
- [json](file://json)
- [os](file://os)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [re](file://re)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [src.core.sovereign_hud](file://src.core.sovereign_hud)
- [src.cstar.core.uplink](file://src.cstar.core.uplink)

### Exports
- `extract_json`
- `TaliesinForge`
- `__init__`
- `weave_code_from_lore`
